macro.name: dacIsBufferComplete
macro.brief: Checks if the current callback refers to a full buffer.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_reset_i
macro.brief: Resumes a thread waiting for DAC streaming completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_reset_s
macro.brief: Resumes a thread waiting for DAC streaming completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up a thread waiting for a DAC streaming state.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_error_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up a thread waiting for DAC streaming termination because of an error.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_isr_half_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code, half buffer event.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_isr_full_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code, full buffer event.
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

macro.name: _dac_isr_error_code
macro.param: Pointer to the DAC driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_dac_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a DAC driver.

typedef.name: hal_dac_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a DAC configuration.

typedef.name: dac_conversion_group_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing a DAC conversion group.

field.name: num_channels
field.brief: Number of DAC channels in the conversion group.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ dac_lld_conversion_group_fields;
/* End of the mandatory fields.*/ dac_lld_config_fields;

field.name: samples
field.brief: Current samples buffer pointer or @p NULL.

field.name: depth
field.brief: Current samples buffer depth or zero.

field.name: grpp
field.brief: Current conversion group pointer or @p NULL.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ dac_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: dacPutChannelX
method.brief: Outputs a value directly on a DAC channel.

method.name: dacStartConversionI
method.brief: Starts a DAC circular streaming conversion.

method.name: dacStartConversion
method.brief: Starts a DAC circular streaming conversion.

method.name: dacStopConversionI
dacStopConversion
dacConvert
method.brief: Starts a DAC circular conversion and waits for one full cycle.

method.name: dacSynchronizeStateS
method.brief: Synchronizes with a DAC streaming state.
method.details: This function synchronizes with a future occurrence of the specified streaming state. State occurrences are not buffered, the waiting thread must already be waiting when the state is reached.
method.retval: If the requested state has been reached.
If conversion stopped or failed while waiting.

method.name: dacSynchronizeState
method.brief: Synchronizes with a DAC streaming state.
method.details: This function synchronizes with a future occurrence of the specified streaming state. State occurrences are not buffered, the waiting thread must already be waiting when the state is reached.
method.retval: If the requested state has been reached.
If conversion stopped or failed while waiting.

method.name: dacGetEventsX
method.brief: Returns the cached DAC event flags.

method.name: dacGetAndClearEventsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached DAC event flags.
method.param: Mask of events to be returned and cleared.

method.name: dacGetErrorsX
method.brief: Returns the cached DAC error flags.

method.name: dacGetAndClearErrorsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached DAC error flags.
method.param: Mask of errors to be returned and cleared.
